title: Rutina Schema
description: A training program (rutina): phases, days, exercises, warmup/cooldown, rules, and notes. This is the data contract an LLM produces (see docs/llm-rutina-prompt.md) and rutina-pwa consumes. Exercise equipment references are validated separately, by id, against data/equipment.json (not expressible in JSON Schema alone — see scripts/validate-rutina.js). No summaryTable field exists here on purpose: a program's summary table is derived from `days` at render time, never authored separately.

schemaVersion.description: Version of this rutina data format, so future rutina-pwa releases can detect and migrate older exported files. Current value: 1.

program.description: Program identity and phase metadata shown in the program header.

phaseName.description: Name of this training phase, e.g. "Adaptación", "Hipertrofia".

gymId.description: Numeric id joining data/gyms.json — identifies which gym's equipment subset this program was authored for.

durationWeeks.description: How many weeks this phase runs for.

lastUpdated.description: Date this program was last updated, as YYYY-MM-DD.

phaseInfo.description: The phase info banner shown at the top of the program: objective, target intensity, rest range, and weekly frequency.

objective.description: Free-text description of this phase's training objective, e.g. "Técnica, preparación de articulaciones, adaptación del sistema nervioso central".

intensityPercent.description: Target intensity as a percentage or percentage range, e.g. "60-65%".

restSeconds.description: Target rest time between sets for this phase, as a range in seconds, e.g. "60-90". (Distinct from exercises[].restSeconds, which is a single number per exercise.)

frequencyPerWeek.description: How many days per week this phase is trained.

warmup.description: Warmup block performed before the day's exercises.

durationMinutes.description: Warmup duration, as a number or range in minutes, e.g. "5-7".

steps.description: Ordered list of warmup instruction lines.

items.description: One warmup instruction line, e.g. "Elíptica o cinta de correr (5-7 minutos a ritmo suave)".

cooldown.description: Cooldown block performed after the day's exercises.

durationMinutes.description: Cooldown duration, as a number or range in minutes, e.g. "5".

steps.description: Ordered list of cooldown instruction lines.

items.description: One cooldown instruction line, e.g. "Estiramientos suaves de los grupos musculares trabajados".

days.description: Ordered list of training days in this program.

items.description: One training day: a label, optional intro text, and an ordered list of exercises.

intro.description: Optional short intro text for this day, e.g. a session name or focus note.

exercises.description: Ordered list of exercises performed on this day.

items.description: One exercise: name, targeted muscle groups, equipment reference, and prescription.

muscleGroups.description: Muscle group tags targeted by this exercise, e.g. ["pectoralis-major", "triceps"].

equipmentId.description: Equipment reference by id/modelCode — MUST exist in data/equipment.json. Never a free-text equipment name. Validated by scripts/validate-rutina.js's cross-check pass (not expressible in JSON Schema alone).

reps.description: Reps (or hold duration for planks/holds, e.g. "30s") as a string to support ranges, e.g. "10-12".

restSeconds.description: Rest time after this exercise, in seconds, e.g. 75.

intensity.description: Optional intensity or RIR (reps in reserve) cue, e.g. "RIR 2-3".

technique.description: Optional ordered list of technique/cue steps.

videoQuery.description: Optional video search query or full URL for a demonstration video, e.g. "tutorial prensa pecho maquina".

rules.description: Ordered list of short rule/guideline items for the program. May be empty.

items.description: One rule/guideline line, e.g. "Hidratación - 2-3 litros de agua al día".

notes.description: List of titled notes. May be empty.

items.description: One note with a title and body text.

progression.description: Optional phase-2+-style month/week progression blocks. Omit this whole property if not applicable.

items.description: One month of progression, containing ordered week blocks.

weeks.description: Ordered list of week blocks within this month.

items.description: One week's progression focus, with an optional deload flag.

focus.description: Free-text focus for this week, e.g. "Aumentar volumen 10%".

deload.description: Optional flag marking this week as a deload (reduced-intensity) week.
